summary: Velion Tutorial System - Iteration 133. All frontend tests passed. Verified: VelionOverlay renders at bottom-right with dismiss X button, tutorial auto-shows for new users (1.5s delay), 16-step tutorial with navigation (Avanti/Indietro/Salta), last step shows 'Inizia!' button, hamburger menu Velion button (cyan with Sparkles icon) reopens tutorial and makes Velion visible again, localStorage persistence for velion_visible and velion_tutorial_done, hover tooltip 'Chiedi a Velion', 'Vai alla pagina →' links navigate correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VelionOverlay.jsx: Correctly implements fixed positioning at bottom-right (bottom-20 right-2 on mobile, bottom-6 right-5 on desktop)
VelionOverlay.jsx: Dismiss button (data-testid='velion-dismiss') saves state to localStorage key 'velion_visible'
VelionOverlay.jsx: Listens for 'velion-show' event to re-show overlay when called from hamburger menu
VelionTutorial.jsx: 16 STEPS array with proper Italian text, icons, colors, tips, and page links
VelionTutorial.jsx: Progress bar animates width based on current step
VelionTutorial.jsx: Last step (isLast) shows 'Inizia!' button instead of 'Avanti'
VelionTutorial.jsx: Close button saves 'velion_tutorial_done' to localStorage
App.js line 805-806: Hamburger menu Velion button dispatches both 'velion-show' and 'velion-tutorial-open' events
App.js line 1748-1752: Auto-show tutorial for new users with 1.5s delay when shouldAutoShowTutorial() returns true
App.js line 1756-1759: Event listener for 'velion-tutorial-open' to open tutorial from hamburger menu
context_for_next_testing_agent: Velion Tutorial System fully verified. Key findings: 1) VelionOverlay positioned at bottom-right (x=1828, y=984 on 1920x1080). 2) Tutorial auto-shows for new users when localStorage 'velion_tutorial_done' is not set. 3) All 16 steps work with Avanti/Indietro/Salta navigation. 4) Hamburger menu Velion button (data-testid='menu-velion-btn') has cyan styling and reopens tutorial. 5) 'Vai alla pagina →' links on steps 2, 8, 11, 12, 13 navigate correctly. 6) Hover tooltip 'Chiedi a Velion' appears on desktop. 7) Daily reward popup (BONUS GIORNALIERO) may appear after login - close with 'Riscuoti' button before testing tutorial.

velion_overlay_position.position: Fixed bottom-right (bottom-20 right-2 mobile, bottom-6 right-5 desktop)

velion_dismiss_button.behavior: Hides overlay and saves velion_visible=false to localStorage

tutorial_step_1.title: Benvenuto in CineWorld!
tutorial_step_1.tip: Puoi richiamarmi in qualsiasi momento dal menu!

tutorial_navigation_salta.behavior: Closes tutorial and marks done in localStorage

tutorial_close_button.behavior: Closes tutorial and saves velion_tutorial_done=true to localStorage

verified_texts: Puoi richiamarmi in qualsiasi momento dal menu!
